creator: softgirlnocode
caption:
I just watched @nick_saraev use Claude Code to build a $10,000 production team in about 30 minutes with ZERO coding skills.

He’s automating his entire channel: 
✂️ The Ghost Editor: It kills silences and actually deletes mistakes when he says the word “cut.” 📈 The Viral Engine: A script that finds “outlier” ideas performing 7x better than average. 
🖼️ The Pose-Match: A thumbnail generator that analyzes the “pitch and yaw” of his nose to match viral poses perfectly.

What’s one part of your daily grind you’d give anything to automate? Drop it in the comments.

#contentcreatortips #techtrends #youtubecreator #videoedits #makemoneyfast
